author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: (1) Commit all untracked files that need to be in the crate (collate.rs, schedule.rs, pytorch_export.rs), (2) cargo fmt --all, (3) cargo clippy on each crate collecting all warnings, (4) fix warnings intelligently — wire unused functions to where they belong rather than deleting or suppressing, (5) bump to 0.1.7, (6) final cargo check + test, (7) commit clean.
